prestazioni: Engine: Theta II 2.0L Turbo GDI (Engine Code: *G4KH*) - Full forged internals including Manley 87mm forged crankshaft, Eagle H-beam connecting rods, and JE 8.5:1 compression forged pistons for 30+ psi boost capability. Pair with a Garrett GTX3582R Gen II turbocharger (0.82 A/R, 62mm compressor wheel) and custom 3.5" stainless steel downpipe with Vibrant 1799 high-flow catalytic converter for 400+ WHP on E85.

Drivetrain: OS Giken Super Lock LSD (part # OS-G200) with upgraded carbon fiber clutch disc (Sachs Performance 3000 series) and lightweight aluminum flywheel (Spec Stage 3+). Replace the OEM half-shafts with Driveshaft Shop 3.5" chromoly axles and upgraded CV joints (Neapco 1-0150) to handle increased torque.

Suspension & Handling: Full Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (part # OH-HY101) with custom valving for the Veloster N's 5-link rear suspension. Install Whiteline adjustable rear sway bar (24mm, part # BSR75XZ) and polyurethane bushings (SuperPro SPF0119K) for reduced body roll. Pair with Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires (245/35R19 front, 265/30R19 rear) on Enkei PF07 wheels (19x9.5 +22 front, 19x10.5 +35 rear) for optimal grip.
estetica: Aero: Rocket Bunny VN Edition widebody kit (part # RB-VN01) with carbon fiber front splitter, rear diffuser, and overfenders to fit the aggressive wheel setup. Add a custom carbon fiber hood (Seibon CF-HYVLN-01) with dual 40mm venting for heat extraction and a custom 3D-printed N Performance-style rear wing (30% larger than OEM) for downforce.

Exterior: Full Respray in Hyundai N Performance Matte Racing Blue (code: P2B) with custom vinyl overlays (3M 1080 Gloss Black) on the roof, mirrors, and side skirts. Replace all badging with carbon fiber N Performance emblems (Hyundai part # 86310-M4100CF) and add LED sequential turn signals (Diode Dynamics SS360) for a modern touch.

Interior: Full Recaro Sportster CS-II bucket seats (part # 29109SJ000) with Schroth Profi II 6-point harnesses (part # 41400.67). Replace the steering wheel with a Momo Prototipo (part # 00112010) wrapped in Alcantara (N Performance Blue stitching) and add a custom carbon fiber gauge pod (AEM 30-0300) for boost, oil temp, and AFR monitoring.
